find:
displayName: "Free",
    description: "This course is available for free as the game's demo."
replace:
displayName: "免费",
    description: "此课程作为游戏演示免费提供。"

find:
displayName: "Base game",
    description: "This course is included in the base version of the game."
replace:
displayName: "基础游戏",
    description: "此课程包含在游戏基础版本中。"

find:
displayName: "DLC",
    description: "This course can be purchased as downloadable content."
replace:
displayName: "DLC",
    description: "此课程可作为下载内容购买。"

find:
displayName: "DLC",
    description: "This course can be purchased as an in-app purchase."
replace:
displayName: "DLC",
    description: "此课程可作为应用内购买。"

find:
displayName: "WIP",
    description: "This content is currently work in progress. Players with alpha access can play it in its unfinished state."
replace:
displayName: "开发中",
    description: "此内容目前正在开发中。拥有 alpha 访问权限的玩家可以在未完成状态下体验。"

find:
displayName: "Future",
    description: "This content is planned for development in the future. Its design will change as work progresses."
replace:
displayName: "未来",
    description: "此内容计划在未来开发。其设计将随工作进展而变化。"

comment: Back button in Music effects settings (chunk_004)

find: This is an overview of released courses and an approximate roadmap of future courses.\n                  The design will change over time as development proceeds.
replace: 这是已发布课程的概览以及未来课程的大致路线图。\n                  设计将随着开发进展而变化。

find: No time estimates are given since\n                  development of new content is highly unpredictable. The game is mainly developed by one person,\n                  so expect slow, but steady progress.
replace: 由于新内容的开发高度不可预测，因此不提供时间估计。\n                  本游戏主要由一人开发，\n                  所以请期待缓慢但稳定的进展。
title: "显示向难以捉摸的100%迈进的进度。"

find: DaVinciKnowing: "Da Vinci once said, \"Knowing is not enough; we must apply. Being willing is not enough; we must do.\""
replace: DaVinciKnowing: "达芬奇曾说：\"光知道是不够的，我们必须应用。光愿意是不够的，我们必须行动。\""

find: DaVinciBlackCanvas: "Da Vinci once said, \"A painter should begin every canvas with a wash of black, because all things in nature are dark except where exposed by the light.\""
replace: DaVinciBlackCanvas: "达芬奇曾说：\"画家应该用黑色洗刷每一块画布，因为自然界的一切都是黑暗的，除非被光线照亮。\""

find: DaVinciNoDesire: "Da Vinci once said, \"Study without desire spoils the memory, and it retains nothing that it takes in.\""
replace: DaVinciNoDesire: "达芬奇曾说：\"没有欲望的学习会破坏记忆，它什么也留不住。\""

find: DaVinciNeverFinished: "Da Vinci once said, \"Art is never finished, only abandoned.\""
replace: DaVinciNeverFinished: "达芬奇曾说：\"艺术永远不会完成，只会被放弃。\""

find: DaVinciScienceArt: "Da Vinci once said, \"Study the science of art. Study the art of science. Develop your senses—especially learn how to see. Realize that everything connects to everything else.\""
replace: DaVinciScienceArt: "达芬奇曾说：\"学习艺术的科学。学习科学的艺术。发展你的感官——特别是学会如何观察。认识到一切都相互关联。\""

find: ConfuciusDontStop: "Confucius once said, \"It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.\""
replace: ConfuciusDontStop: "孔子曾说：\"不怕慢，就怕站。\""

find: PicassoEveryChild: "Picasso once said, \"Every child is an artist. The problem is how to remain an artist once you grow up.\""
replace: PicassoEveryChild: "毕加索曾说：\"每个孩子都是艺术家。问题是如何在长大后仍然保持艺术家的心。\""

find: PicassoWhyNot: "Picasso once said, \"Others have seen what is and asked why. I have seen what could be and asked why not.\""
replace: PicassoWhyNot: "毕加索曾说：\"别人看到事物的本来面目，问为什么。我看到事物可能的样子，问为什么不。\""

find: PicassoLearnRules: "Picasso once said, \"Learn the rules like a pro, so you can break them like an artist.\""
replace: PicassoLearnRules: "毕加索曾说：\"像专业人士一样学习规则，这样你才能像艺术家一样打破它们。\""

find: PicassoTomorrow: "Picasso once said, \"Only put off until tomorrow what you are willing to die having left undone.\""
replace: PicassoTomorrow: "毕加索曾说：\"只有那些你愿意死时仍未完成的事，才值得推迟到明天。\""

find: PicassoYoung: "Picasso once said, \"It takes a very long time to become young.\""
replace: PicassoYoung: "毕加索曾说：\"变年轻需要很长很长的时间。\""

find: PicassoDoing: "Picasso once said, \"I am always doing that which I can not do, in order that I may learn how to do it.\""
replace: PicassoDoing: "毕加索曾说：\"我总是在做我不会做的事，这样我才能学会如何去做。\""

find: PicassoMeaning: "Picasso once said, \"The meaning of life is to find your gift. The purpose of life is to give it away.\""
replace: PicassoMeaning: "毕加索曾说：\"生命的意义在于发现你的天赋。生命的目的在于将其奉献出去。\""

find: AntoineDeSaintExuperyPerfeection: "Antoine de Saint-Exupéry once said, \"Perfection is achieved, not when there is nothing more to add, but when there is nothing left to take away.\""
replace: AntoineDeSaintExuperyPerfeection: "圣埃克苏佩里曾说：\"完美不是无可添加，而是无可删减。\""

find: JessicaHischeProcrastinate: "Jessica Hische once said, \"The work you do while you procrastinate is probably the work you should be doing for the rest of your life.\""
replace: JessicaHischeProcrastinate: "杰西卡·希谢曾说：\"你在拖延时做的工作，可能就是你余生应该做的工作。\""

find: DaliInspires: "Dali once said, \"A true artist is not one who is inspired, but one who inspires others.\""
replace: DaliInspires: "达利曾说：\"真正的艺术家不是被启发的人，而是启发他人的人。\""

find: EinsteinImaginationEncirclesTheWorld: "Einstein once said, \"I am enough of an artist to draw freely upon my imagination. Imagination is more important than knowledge. Knowledge is limited. Imagination encircles the world.\""
replace: EinsteinImaginationEncirclesTheWorld: "爱因斯坦曾说：\"我足够成为一位艺术家，可以自由地运用我的想象力。想象力比知识更重要。知识是有限的。想象力环绕世界。\""

find: EinsteinImaginationWillGetYouEverywhere: "Einstein once said, \"Logic will get you from A to Z; imagination will get you everywhere.\""
replace: EinsteinImaginationWillGetYouEverywhere: "爱因斯坦曾说：\"逻辑会带你从A到Z；想象力会带你去任何地方。\""

find: EinsteinKeepMoving: "Einstein once said, \"Life is like riding a bicycle. To keep your balance, you must keep moving.\""
replace: EinsteinKeepMoving: "爱因斯坦曾说：\"人生就像骑自行车。要保持平衡，就必须不断前进。\""

find: EinsteinMistake: "Einstein once said, \"Anyone who has never made a mistake has never tried anything new.\""
replace: EinsteinMistake: "爱因斯坦曾说：\"从未犯过错的人，也从未尝试过新事物。\""

find: EinsteinPassion: "Einstein once said, \"I have no special talents. I am only passionately curious.\""
replace: EinsteinPassion: "爱因斯坦曾说：\"我没有特别的才能。我只是充满好奇。\""

find: GandhiLearn: "Gandhi once said, \"Live as if you were to die tomorrow. Learn as if you were to live forever.\""
replace: GandhiLearn: "甘地曾说：\"像明天就会死去那样生活。像会永远活着那样学习。\""

find: VanGoghPaint: "Van Gogh once said, \"If you hear a voice within you say you cannot paint, then by all means paint and that voice will be silenced.\""
replace: VanGoghPaint: "梵高曾说：\"如果你听到内心有个声音说你不会画画，那就一定要去画，那个声音就会消失。\""

find: TuringImpossible: "Turing once said, \"Those who can imagine anything, can create the impossible.\""
replace: TuringImpossible: "图灵曾说：\"那些能够想象任何事物的人，能够创造不可能。\""

find: BramStokerFailure: "Bram Stoker once said, \"We learn from failure, not from success!\""
replace: BramStokerFailure: "布拉姆·斯托克曾说：\"我们从失败中学习，而不是从成功中！\""

find: RichardFeynmannStudy: "Richard Feynmann once said, \"Study hard what interests you the most in the most undisciplined, irreverent and original manner possible.\""
replace: RichardFeynmannStudy: "理查德·费曼曾说：\"以最不守规矩、最不恭敬、最原创的方式，努力学习你最感兴趣的东西。\""

find: RoyTBennettExperience: "Roy T. Bennett once said, \"Some things cannot be taught; they must be experienced. You never learn the most valuable lessons in life until you go through your own journey.\""
replace: RoyTBennettExperience: "罗伊·T·贝内特曾说：\"有些东西无法被教会；它们必须被体验。只有经历自己的旅程，你才能学到人生中最宝贵的课程。\""

find: SylviaPlathDoubt: "Sylvia Plath once said, \"The worst enemy to creativity is self-doubt.\""
replace: SylviaPlathDoubt: "西尔维娅·普拉斯曾说：\"创造力最大的敌人是自我怀疑。\""

find: MayaAngelouCreativity: "Maya Angelou once said, \"You can't use up creativity. The more you use, the more you have.\""
replace: MayaAngelouCreativity: "玛雅·安杰洛曾说：\"创造力是用不完的。你用得越多，拥有的就越多。\""

find: KenRobinsonCuriosity: "Ken Robinson once said, \"Curiosity is the engine of achievement.\""
replace: KenRobinsonCuriosity: "肯·罗宾逊曾说：\"好奇心是成就的引擎。\""

find: HenriMatisseInspiration: "Henri Matisse once said, \"Don’t wait for inspiration. It comes while one is working.\""
replace: HenriMatisseInspiration: "亨利·马蒂斯曾说：\"不要等待灵感。它会在工作时到来。\""

find: WaltDisneyDreams: "Walt Disney once said, \"All our dreams can come true, if we have the courage to pursue them.\""
replace: WaltDisneyDreams: "华特·迪士尼曾说：\"如果我们有勇气去追求，所有的梦想都能成真。\""

find: WaltDisneyDoing: "Walt Disney once said, \"The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.\""
replace: WaltDisneyDoing: "华特·迪士尼曾说：\"开始的方法就是停止空谈，开始行动。\""

find: WaltDisneyUnique: "Walt Disney once said, \"The more you like yourself, the less you are like anyone else, which makes you unique.\""
replace: WaltDisneyUnique: "华特·迪士尼曾说：\"你越喜欢自己，就越不像其他人，这让你变得独一无二。\""

find: JohnDeweyReflecting: "John Dewey once said, \"We do not learn from experience... we learn from reflecting on experience.\""
replace: JohnDeweyReflecting: "约翰·杜威曾说：\"我们不是从经验中学习……我们是从对经验的反思中学习。\""

find: JohnDeweyArt: "John Dewey once said, \"Art is the most effective mode of communications that exists.\""
replace: JohnDeweyArt: "约翰·杜威曾说：\"艺术是现存最有效的沟通方式。\""

find: EdCatmullPerfect: "Ed Catmull once said, \"Don’t wait for things to be perfect before you share them with others. Show early and show often. It’ll be pretty when we get there, but it won’t be pretty along the way.\""
replace: EdCatmullPerfect: "艾德·卡特姆曾说：\"不要等到完美才与他人分享。尽早展示，经常展示。到达终点时会很美，但沿途不会很美。\""

find: EdCatmullFailure: "Ed Catmull once said, \"If you aren’t experiencing failure, then you are making a far worse mistake: You are being driven by the desire to avoid it.\""
replace: EdCatmullFailure: "艾德·卡特姆曾说：\"如果你没有经历失败，那你正在犯一个更严重的错误：你被避免失败的欲望所驱使。\""

find: EdCatmullUnexpected: "Ed Catmull once said, \"You’ll never stumble upon the unexpected if you stick only to the familiar.\""
replace: EdCatmullUnexpected: "艾德·卡特姆曾说：\"如果你只坚持熟悉的事物，就永远不会偶然发现意外。\""

find: EdCatmullCreativity: "Ed Catmull once said, \"We humans like to know where we are headed, but creativity demands that we travel paths that lead to who-knows-where.\""
replace: EdCatmullCreativity: "艾德·卡特姆曾说：\"我们人类喜欢知道我们要去哪里，但创造力要求我们走那些通向未知之地的道路。\""

find: AlanKayFuture: "Alan Kay once said, \"The best way to predict the future is to invent it.\""
replace: AlanKayFuture: "艾伦·凯曾说：\"预测未来最好的方式就是创造它。\""

find: AlanWattsEngaged: "Alan Watts once said, \"This is the real secret of life—to be completely engaged with what you are doing in the here and now. And instead of calling it work, realize it is play.\""
replace: AlanWattsEngaged: "艾伦·瓦兹曾说：\"生活的真正秘诀在于——完全投入到你此时此刻正在做的事情中。不要称之为工作，要意识到它是游戏。\""

find: RoaldDahlPlay: "Roald Dahl once said, \"Life is more fun if you play games.\""
replace: RoaldDahlPlay: "罗尔德·达尔曾说：\"如果你玩游戏，生活会更有趣。\""

find: GeorgeBernardShawPlaying: "George Bernard Shaw once said, \"We don't stop playing because we grow old; we grow old because we stop playing.\""
replace: GeorgeBernardShawPlaying: "萧伯纳曾说：\"我们不是因为变老才停止玩耍；我们是因为停止玩耍才变老。\""

find: BobRossMistakes: "Bob Ross once said, \"We don't make mistakes, just happy little accidents.\""
replace: BobRossMistakes: "鲍勃·罗斯曾说：\"我们不犯错误，只是有一些快乐的小意外。\""

find: BobRossTalent: "Bob Ross once said, \"Talent is a pursued interest. Anything that you're willing to practice, you can do.\""
replace: BobRossTalent: "鲍勃·罗斯曾说：\"天赋就是追求的兴趣。任何你愿意练习的事情，你都能做到。\""

find: BobRossBelieving: "Bob Ross once said, \"The secret to doing anything is believing that you can do it. Anything that you believe you can do strong enough, you can do. Anything. As long as you believe.\""
replace: BobRossBelieving: "鲍勃·罗斯曾说：\"做任何事的秘诀就是相信你能做到。任何你足够相信你能做到的事，你都能做到。任何事。只要你相信。\""

find: ThichNhatHanhReflecting: "Thich Nhat Hanh once said, \"If learning is not followed by reflecting and practicing, it is not true learning.\""
replace: ThichNhatHanhReflecting: "一行禅师曾说：\"如果学习之后没有反思和实践，那就不是真正的学习。\""

find: title: "Select whether to track your own progress or one of your characters."
replace: title: "选择追踪您自己的进度还是您的一个角色。"
